headline: Deal Dispatch: GoPro Retains Houlihan Lokey In Strategic Review, Brookfield Buys World Freight Company, YesCare Corp. Bankruptcy
summary: Major M&A deals this week include: LVMH agrees to sell Marc Jacobs to WHP Global, 365 Markets buys Cantaloupe, Apollo mulls sale of MFIC.
